HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering

6#include "TriQuadPol.h"
7
11TriQuadPol::TriQuadPol(Triangle* inTp, rvec inPos, int nQuadrature,
12 double(*xQuadrature)[2], double* wQuadrature)
13 : Tp(inTp), pos(inPos), nQuadrature(nQuadrature),
14 xQuadrature(xQuadrature), wQuadrature(wQuadrature) { adaptPolar(); }
15
24void TriQuadPol::adaptPolar()
25{
26 quadPoints.clear(); // clear previous results
27 quadWeights.clear(); // clear previous results
28
29 transformInPlane(); // project from 3D to 2D triangle plane
30
31 // Center of the triangle in plane
32 rvec TpCenter(0.0, 0.0, 0.0);
33 for (int i = 0; i < 3; ++i) {
34 TpCenter += vertsInPlane[i] / 3.0;
35 }
36
37 // Angle between impact positions and boundary centroids
38 rvec distVec = TpCenter - posInPlane;
39 double vertsTheta0 = std::atan2(distVec[1], distVec[0]);
40
41 // Expand vertices in rotated system
42 std::vector<double> vertX(3), vertY(3);
43 for (int i = 0; i < 3; ++i) {
44 vertX[i] = (vertsInPlane[i][0] - posInPlane[0]) * cos(vertsTheta0) +
45 (vertsInPlane[i][1] - posInPlane[1]) * sin(vertsTheta0);
46 vertY[i] = (vertsInPlane[i][1] - posInPlane[1]) * cos(vertsTheta0) -
47 (vertsInPlane[i][0] - posInPlane[0]) * sin(vertsTheta0);
48 }
49
50 // Convert vertices to polar coordinates
51 std::vector<double> vertsRho(3), vertsTheta(3);
52 for (int i = 0; i < 3; ++i) {
53 vertsRho[i] = std::hypot(vertX[i], vertY[i]);
54 vertsTheta[i] = std::atan2(vertY[i], vertX[i]);
55 }
56
57 // Sort vertices by angle
58 std::vector<int> idx(3);
59 std::iota(idx.begin(), idx.end(), 0);
60 std::sort(idx.begin(), idx.end(), [&](int a, int b) { return vertsTheta[a] < vertsTheta[b]; });
61 std::vector<double> vertsRhoSorted(3), vertsThetaSorted(3);
62 for (int i = 0; i < 3; ++i) {
63 vertsRhoSorted[i] = vertsRho[idx[i]];
64 vertsThetaSorted[i] = vertsTheta[idx[i]];
65 }
66
67 // Adapt integration points to triangle
68 std::vector<double> intThetas, intWeights, minRadius, maxRadius;
69 bool isInTriangle = pointInTriangle(posInPlane, vertsInPlane[0], vertsInPlane[1], vertsInPlane[2]);
70 if (isInTriangle) // if the observation point is within the triangle
71 {
72 // Line in polar coordinates: r(t) = d0 / cos(t - t0) -> Output: d0, t0
73 std::pair<double, double> line01 = lineInPolar(vertsThetaSorted[0], vertsRhoSorted[0],
74 vertsThetaSorted[1], vertsRhoSorted[1]);
75 std::pair<double, double> line12 = lineInPolar(vertsThetaSorted[1], vertsRhoSorted[1],
76 vertsThetaSorted[2], vertsRhoSorted[2]);
77 std::pair<double, double> line20 = lineInPolar(vertsThetaSorted[2], vertsRhoSorted[2],
78 vertsThetaSorted[0], vertsRhoSorted[0]);
79
80 // Adapt integration points to triangle
81 std::vector<double> thetaTemp, weightTemp, minRadiusTemp, maxRadiusTemp;
82 adaptIn(vertsTheta0, vertsThetaSorted[0], vertsThetaSorted[1], line01.first, line01.second,
83 thetaTemp, weightTemp, minRadiusTemp, maxRadiusTemp);
84 intThetas.insert(intThetas.end(), thetaTemp.begin(), thetaTemp.end());
85 intWeights.insert(intWeights.end(), weightTemp.begin(), weightTemp.end());
86 minRadius.insert(minRadius.end(), minRadiusTemp.begin(), minRadiusTemp.end());
87 maxRadius.insert(maxRadius.end(), maxRadiusTemp.begin(), maxRadiusTemp.end());
88
89 adaptIn(vertsTheta0, vertsThetaSorted[1], vertsThetaSorted[2], line12.first, line12.second,
90 thetaTemp, weightTemp, minRadiusTemp, maxRadiusTemp);
91 intThetas.insert(intThetas.end(), thetaTemp.begin(), thetaTemp.end());
92 intWeights.insert(intWeights.end(), weightTemp.begin(), weightTemp.end());
93 minRadius.insert(minRadius.end(), minRadiusTemp.begin(), minRadiusTemp.end());
94 maxRadius.insert(maxRadius.end(), maxRadiusTemp.begin(), maxRadiusTemp.end());
95
96 adaptIn(vertsTheta0, vertsThetaSorted[2], vertsThetaSorted[0], line20.first, line20.second,
97 thetaTemp, weightTemp, minRadiusTemp, maxRadiusTemp);
98 intThetas.insert(intThetas.end(), thetaTemp.begin(), thetaTemp.end());
99 intWeights.insert(intWeights.end(), weightTemp.begin(), weightTemp.end());
100 minRadius.insert(minRadius.end(), minRadiusTemp.begin(), minRadiusTemp.end());
101 maxRadius.insert(maxRadius.end(), maxRadiusTemp.begin(), maxRadiusTemp.end());
102 }
103 else // if the observation point is not within the circumcircle
104 {
105 // Line in polar coordinates: r(t) = d0 / cos(t - t0) -> Output: d0, t0
106 std::pair<double, double> line01 = lineInPolar(vertsThetaSorted[0], vertsRhoSorted[0],
107 vertsThetaSorted[1], vertsRhoSorted[1]);
108 std::pair<double, double> line02 = lineInPolar(vertsThetaSorted[0], vertsRhoSorted[0],
109 vertsThetaSorted[2], vertsRhoSorted[2]);
110 std::pair<double, double> line12 = lineInPolar(vertsThetaSorted[1], vertsRhoSorted[1],
111 vertsThetaSorted[2], vertsRhoSorted[2]);
112
113 // Adapt integration points to triangle
114 std::vector<double> thetaTemp, weightTemp, minRadiusTemp, maxRadiusTemp;
115 adaptOut(vertsTheta0, vertsThetaSorted[0], vertsThetaSorted[1],
116 line01.first, line01.second, line02.first, line02.second,
117 thetaTemp, weightTemp, minRadiusTemp, maxRadiusTemp);
118 intThetas.insert(intThetas.end(), thetaTemp.begin(), thetaTemp.end());
119 intWeights.insert(intWeights.end(), weightTemp.begin(), weightTemp.end());
120 minRadius.insert(minRadius.end(), minRadiusTemp.begin(), minRadiusTemp.end());
121 maxRadius.insert(maxRadius.end(), maxRadiusTemp.begin(), maxRadiusTemp.end());
122
123 adaptOut(vertsTheta0, vertsThetaSorted[1], vertsThetaSorted[2],
124 line12.first, line12.second, line02.first, line02.second,
125 thetaTemp, weightTemp, minRadiusTemp, maxRadiusTemp);
126 intThetas.insert(intThetas.end(), thetaTemp.begin(), thetaTemp.end());
127 intWeights.insert(intWeights.end(), weightTemp.begin(), weightTemp.end());
128 minRadius.insert(minRadius.end(), minRadiusTemp.begin(), minRadiusTemp.end());
129 maxRadius.insert(maxRadius.end(), maxRadiusTemp.begin(), maxRadiusTemp.end());
130 }
131 // Assemble quadrature points
132 assembleFromPolar(intThetas, intWeights, minRadius, maxRadius);
133}
134
139void TriQuadPol::transformInPlane() {
140 rvec rp[3];
141 for (int i = 0; i < 3; ++i) rp[i] = Tp->Node(i);
142
143 // unit vectors
144 rvec e1 = rp[1] - rp[0]; e1 /= sqrt( dot(e1, e1) );
145 rvec temp = rp[2] - rp[0];
146 rvec e3 = cross(e1, temp); e3 /= sqrt( dot(e3, e3) );
147 rvec e2 = cross(e3, e1);
148
149 // vertices in triangle plane
150 vertsInPlane.push_back( rvec( 0.0, 0.0, 0.0 ) ); // rp[0] in plane
151 temp = rp[1] - rp[0];
152 vertsInPlane.push_back( rvec( clean( dot(temp, e1) ),
153 clean( dot(temp, e2) ), 0.0 ) ); // rp[1] in plane
154 temp = rp[2] - rp[0];
155 vertsInPlane.push_back( rvec( clean( dot(temp, e1) ),
156 clean( dot(temp, e2) ), 0.0 ) ); // rp[2] in plane
157
158 // Origin in triangle plane
159 posInPlane = rvec( clean( dot(e1, pos - rp[0]) ), clean( dot(e2, pos - rp[0]) ), 0.0 );
160}
161
167std::pair<double, double> TriQuadPol::lineInPolar(double theta1, double rho1, double theta2, double rho2) {
168 if (theta1 == theta2) theta2 += 1e-10; // avoid division by zero
169 double sinSign = std::sin(theta2 - theta1) > 0 ? 1.0 : -1.0;
170 double R = std::sqrt(rho1 * rho1 + rho2 * rho2 - 2.0 * rho1 * rho2 * std::cos(theta2 - theta1));
171
172 // line parameters
173 double coeff0 = sinSign / R * rho1 * rho2 * std::sin(theta2 - theta1);
174 double theta0 = std::atan2(-sinSign * (rho2 * std::cos(theta2) - rho1 * std::cos(theta1)),
175 sinSign * (rho2 * std::sin(theta2) - rho1 * std::sin(theta1)) );
176 return std::make_pair(theta0, coeff0);
177}
178
185void TriQuadPol::adaptIn(double theta0, double thetaStart, double thetaEnd, double tLine, double dLine,
186 std::vector<double>& intThetas, std::vector<double>& intWeights,
187 std::vector<double>& minRadius, std::vector<double>& maxRadius)
188{
189 // clear previous results
190 intThetas.clear(); intWeights.clear(); minRadius.clear(); maxRadius.clear();
191
192 // Wrap-around for negative angle spans
193 if (thetaEnd < thetaStart) thetaEnd += 2.0 * M_PI;
194
195 // Allocate and compute
196 intThetas.resize(nQuadrature); intWeights.resize(nQuadrature);
197 minRadius.resize(nQuadrature, 0.0); maxRadius.resize(nQuadrature);
198
199 for (int i = 0; i < nQuadrature; ++i) {
200 intThetas[i] = thetaStart + (thetaEnd - thetaStart) * xQuadrature[i][0];
201 maxRadius[i] = dLine / std::cos(intThetas[i] - tLine);
202 intWeights[i] = (thetaEnd - thetaStart) * wQuadrature[i];
203 intThetas[i] += theta0;
204 }
205}
206
212void TriQuadPol::adaptOut(double theta0, double thetaStart, double thetaEnd,
213 double tLineFirst, double dLineFirst, double tLineSecond, double dLineSecond,
214 std::vector<double>& intThetas, std::vector<double>& intWeights,
215 std::vector<double>& minRadius, std::vector<double>& maxRadius)
216{
217 // clear previous results
218 intThetas.clear(); intWeights.clear(); minRadius.clear(); maxRadius.clear();
219
220 // Allocate and compute
221 intThetas.resize(nQuadrature); intWeights.resize(nQuadrature);
222 minRadius.resize(nQuadrature, 0.0); maxRadius.resize(nQuadrature);
223
224 for (int i = 0; i < nQuadrature; ++i) {
225 intThetas[i] = thetaStart + (thetaEnd - thetaStart) * xQuadrature[i][0];
226 minRadius[i] = dLineFirst / std::cos(intThetas[i] - tLineFirst);
227 maxRadius[i] = dLineSecond / std::cos(intThetas[i] - tLineSecond);
228 intWeights[i] = (thetaEnd - thetaStart) * wQuadrature[i];
229 intThetas[i] += theta0;
230 if (minRadius[i] > maxRadius[i]) std::swap(minRadius[i], maxRadius[i]);
231 }
232}
233
240void TriQuadPol::assembleFromPolar(const std::vector<double>& inThetas,
241 const std::vector<double>& inWeights,
242 const std::vector<double>& inMinRadii,
243 const std::vector<double>& inMaxRadii)
244{
245 // triangle vertices
246 const rvec& vertex1 = vertsInPlane[0];
247 const rvec& vertex2 = vertsInPlane[1];
248 const rvec& vertex3 = vertsInPlane[2];
249
250 for (int j = 0; j < inThetas.size(); ++j) {
251 for (int i = 0; i < nQuadrature; ++i) {
252 // expand integration points and weights along radial direction
253 double r = inMinRadii[j] + xQuadrature[i][0] * (inMaxRadii[j] - inMinRadii[j]);
254 double weight = inWeights[j] * wQuadrature[i] * (inMaxRadii[j] - inMinRadii[j]) * r;
255
256 // convert integration points to Cartesian coordinates
257 double x = posInPlane[0] + r * std::cos(inThetas[j]);
258 double y = posInPlane[1] + r * std::sin(inThetas[j]);
259
260 // convert from Cartesian to triangle coordinates
261 double a = (vertex2[1] - vertex3[1]) * (vertex1[0] - vertex3[0]) +
262 (vertex3[0] - vertex2[0]) * (vertex1[1] - vertex3[1]);
263 double xt = ( (vertex2[1] - vertex3[1]) * (x - vertex3[0]) +
264 (vertex3[0] - vertex2[0]) * (y - vertex3[1]) ) / a;
265 double yt = ( (vertex3[1] - vertex1[1]) * (x - vertex3[0]) +
266 (vertex1[0] - vertex3[0]) * (y - vertex3[1])) / a;
267
268 rvec pt(3); pt[0] = xt; pt[1] = yt; pt[2] = 1.0 - xt - yt;
269 quadPoints.push_back(pt);
270 quadWeights.push_back(weight);
271 }
272 }
273}
